title: nepeta iraqo-iranica
intro: Nepeta iraqo-iranica, also known as Persian catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta iraqo-iranica include relief from digestive issues, reduction of anxiety and stress, and improvement of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Nepeta iraqo-iranica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
